title: NVIDIA/skills
abstract: Official, NVIDIA-verified skills for AI agents. Over 30 product categories covering CUDA-X libraries, AI Blueprints, and platform tools. Each skill includes a digital signature for security verification.
abstract_zh: NVIDIA官方认证的AI Agent技能目录！覆盖30+产品品类，包括CUDA-X库、AI蓝图和平台工具。每个技能都带有数字签名，确保内容安全可信。NVIDIA生态的Agent技能入口。
